rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL PENNY VS. ANITA MULCAHY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 19, 2014, Line 1: CROSS-COMPLAINANTS ANITA MULCAHY and SUSANNE MULCAHY'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER: DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 484.090. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MAYFIELD et al VS. BALDWIN FRANK MYERS et al

Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's October 22, 2014 minute order. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP GARCIA VS. CARRIE WILSON, IN HER CAPACITCY AS TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 19, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANT ANGELO WILSON'S Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16: DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden and show that Plaintiff's causes of action arise out of protected activity. As to the 8th cause of action (wrongful eviction), as alleged, it is based on failure to address noise complaints; filming and audio recording Plaintiff's residence; and refusal to cash rent checks. As to the "claim based on Defendant's failure to cash his rent checks" (Notice of Motion 1:25-26), Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that a single claim within a cause of action based on multiple grounds may be stricken pursuant to CCP 425.16. Hearing Required to address why sanctions should not be granted. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN E. MILES VS. DANIEL N. MILES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 19, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT LAURA MILES' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Continued to December 19, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than November 26, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES CHARLES VS. DAVID LEVY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 19, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANTS DAVID LEVY, ELEANOR LEVY, and LEVY FAMILY TRUST's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT: DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden and show that Plaintiff's complaint for damages and cause of action therein arise out of protected activity. Complaint is based on allegation of habitability defects and also mentions in passing defendant "leaving notes to scare and intimidate." Complaint does not mention March 13, 2014 Notice to Cure or Quit and complaint was signed by counsel on July 17, 2014, i.e. 4 days before July 21, 2014 Notice to Pay Rent or Quit was served. (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Deft Roberta Fisher

rulings.Case Title: ANNA JUNG VS. VAN RILEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production, And Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 19, 2014, Line 8: PLAINTIFF ANNA JUNG'S Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production, to Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions: DENIED. Conflict regarding time and manner of service of discovery requests, i.e. service by mail on October 17, 2014 (Bornstein Declaration, paragraph 2 and 3) vs. hand delivery on October 23, 2104 (Proof of Service, Bornstein Declaration, Ex. E). (501/REQ)
